rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks within component type scopes for port-based assumptions and guarantees.
Use implementation scopes for bindings involving subcomponents and connections.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE declarations use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in type scope guarantees.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in type contracts.
Align assumed and actual types in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations.
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE.
Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not(...), =>.
anti_patterns: Do not place port-based assumptions or guarantees in implementation scopes unless required for bindings.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through variables.
